Sergio Benlloch

R&D Security Engineer

Computer engineer specialized in Computer Engineering, currently working as an R&D Security Engineer on practical security assessment, reverse engineering, cryptography, AI security, and robust mitigation work with engineering teams.

01 / capabilities

Penetration Testing

Manual assessments · Vulnerability analysis · Source code audits · Threat modeling

Offensive Security

Reverse engineering · ARM/x86 · Firmware analysis · PoC development

Homomorphic encryption · TEEs · Differential privacy · MPC

Cryptography

Applied cryptography · Post-quantum cryptography · Secure implementations · Protocol review · Risk modeling

AI Security

AI security reviews · Threat modeling · Misuse analysis · Secure ML pipelines

Engineering

Python · Go · C · Java · Bash · Linux · Automation

02 / experience

Research and offensive security

June 2023 - Present

Security Researcher

ITI - Instituto Tecnológico de Informática · Valencia, Spain (Hybrid)

  • Work on security research and security engineering tasks.
  • Focus areas include PETs, cryptography, AI security, and DevSecOps.
December 2021 - January 2023

Offensive Security Researcher

Cyber Intelligence S.L. · Valencia, Spain

  • Worked in security research using Python and Bash.
  • Reviewed binaries as part of security assessment work.

Highlights

  • Builds scripts and tools to automate repetitive security assessment workflows.
  • Applies ML techniques including CNNs and Transformers to anomaly detection, security analytics, and AI security reviews.
  • Connects academic work on binary optimization, executable-file intelligence, and secure IoT architecture.
  • Writes findings in a way that is useful for both engineering and decision making.
  • Works well in research and product contexts where the problem is not fully defined yet.

Languages

  • Spanish: Native or bilingual proficiency
  • Catalan: Native or bilingual proficiency
  • English: Full professional proficiency

03 / research outputs

Papers and academic work

2025 / arXiv / Computing Conference 2026

Threat Modeling for Enhancing Security of IoT Audio Classification Devices

Security architecture and threat modeling for microphone-equipped IoT nodes using remote attestation, mutually authenticated TLS, post-quantum resilience, and secure update/data handling.

#iot-security#threat-modeling#post-quantum
2023 / RIUNET / UPV Master's thesis

Inteligencia de archivos binarios

Automated binary characterization and machine-learning modeling for executable files, framed as a cyberintelligence pipeline for security decision support.

#binary-analysis#machine-learning#cyberintelligence
2021 / RIUNET / UPV Bachelor's thesis

Exploración del espacio de diseño multiobjetivo para ficheros binarios

Design-space exploration for GCC compilation flags to balance executable size, execution time, CPU and memory use, and binary robustness.

#gcc#optimization#binary-robustness

04 / selected work

Projects

2024 / active

go-diffie

A Go implementation and learning project around Diffie-Hellman style secret exchange.

#go#cryptography#key-exchange
2024 / active

intfact

Go implementations of integer factorization algorithms for decomposing composite numbers into prime components.

#go#cryptography#factorization#math
2023 / active

BinSniff

Characteristic extractor for binaries, focused on PE and ELF parsing workflows.

#python#elf#pe#parser#reverse-engineering
2023 / active

devAV

Toolkit for machine learning-based malware detectors: data mining, feature extraction, model selection, and prototype deployment.

#jupyter#machine-learning#malware#av#parser

05 / notes

Blog

Sep 18, 2025

Paper: threat modeling for audio-classifying IoT devices

A note on the paper about securing microphone-equipped IoT nodes, audio classification, firmware, data handling, and communications.

#paper#iot-security#threat-modeling#pqc
Jul 10, 2023

Master's thesis: binary file intelligence

A practical note on my master's thesis: extracting features from executables and using machine learning as support for cyberintelligence workflows.

#master-thesis#binary-analysis#machine-learning#cyberintelligence
